## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] wording refinement
- [ ] structural refinement
- [ ] terminology clarification
- [ ] new documentation
- [ ] example or case addition
- [ ] issue template / repository workflow update
- [ ] other

## What changed

List the main changes.

## Why this change is needed

Explain the problem this PR solves.

## Methodology impact

Does this PR change meaning, or only improve expression?

- [ ] no methodology meaning change
- [ ] clarifies existing meaning
- [ ] changes terminology or conceptual boundaries
- [ ] changes structural judgment

If it changes meaning, explain exactly how.

## Verification

Describe how you checked the change.

- [ ] links checked
- [ ] wording reviewed
- [ ] terminology consistency reviewed
- [ ] structure reviewed against existing docs

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to.
